## CommandStatusExtensions\.IsTerminal\(this CommandStatus\) Method

Determines whether the command has reached a terminal state — i\.e\., a state from which
no further status transitions occur\.

```csharp
public static bool IsTerminal(this Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus status);
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatusExtensions.IsTerminal(thisHexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus).status'></a>

`status` [CommandStatus](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus')

The command lifecycle status to inspect\.

#### Returns
[System\.Boolean](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.boolean 'System\.Boolean')
`true` if the status is one of [Completed](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.Completed 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.Completed'),
            [Rejected](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.Rejected 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.Rejected'), [PublishFailed](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.PublishFailed 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.PublishFailed'), or
            [TimedOut](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.TimedOut 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.TimedOut'); `false` for the in\-flight states
            [Received](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.Received 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.Received'), [Processing](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.Processing 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.Processing'),
            [EventsStored](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.EventsStored 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.EventsStored'), and [EventsPublished](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Commands.CommandStatus.EventsPublished 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Commands\.CommandStatus\.EventsPublished')\.

### Remarks
The terminal/in\-flight split is determined by the numeric convention
`status >= CommandStatus.Completed`, which is the single source of truth
for this contract\. Callers MUST consume this extension instead of re\-implementing
the convention to keep the rule centralized and testable\.
